[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A young person takes a selfie indoors, looking at the camera while making a peace sign with one hand.

Main Subject:
A young person with short, dark hair and light-to-medium skin is centered in the foreground, facing the camera with a neutral expression. One hand is raised near the left side of the frame making a V-shaped peace sign with the index and middle fingers, while the other fingers are curled inward.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors in a room with a ceiling and walls in the background. Behind the person, there is a workout or gym-like setup with visible metal bars and what looks like a black padded section or equipment frame. The lighting is dim and slightly warm, and the image is softly focused.

Visual Details:
The person wears a dark short-sleeved shirt. The background includes a horizontal metal bar across the upper area and additional equipment elements, with muted gray and dark tones. The camera angle is at about face level, and the person’s face is well-lit compared to the darker background, suggesting the light source is closer to the camera or on the front.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person posing for a selfie indoors while holding up a peace sign. Gym-like equipment and metal bars are visible behind them in a dimly lit room.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text detected in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None visible / not detected

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only a person’s image and a gym background; there is no readable or clearly visible text to extract.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, messy hair and a faint mustache is taking a selfie. He is wearing a dark t-shirt. His left hand is raised, forming a rock-on gesture with his index and pinky fingers extended, while his thumb is tucked in. The background is dimly lit and appears to be an indoor space with concrete walls and some exercise equipment, possibly a pull-up bar, visible above his head. The lighting is low and somewhat gritty, casting soft shadows and creating a casual, candid mood. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, with the man's skin and the grey concrete providing the main contrast. The image has a slightly grainy texture, suggesting it was taken with a mobile phone in low light conditions.
